geometric sparkles in the corners"},"headline":{"main":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"自由にカスタマイズ\"}","sub":"{argument name=\"subheadline text\" default=\"6種類の入力形式で項目設計\"}","main_style":"very large bold Japanese sans-serif, deep blue to violet gradient fill","sub_style":"medium bold Japanese sans-serif, teal and dark navy text with small decorative sparkle icons and thin divider lines on both sides"},"layout":{"composition":"two-column product feature banner","sections":[{"title":"input type shadow","icon_style":"large simple colored icons inside pale circular badges","colors":["purple","teal","teal","purple","teal","orange"]},{"title":"form builder UI","position":"right","count":6,"labels":["お名前","性別","興味のあるサービス","ご要望・お悩み","ご来店希望日時","参考画像（任意）"],"container":"large rounded white application window with purple-blue header bar","header_text":"{argument name=\"panel title\" default=\"カルテ項目を作成\"}","field_types":["single-line text input","radio buttons","checkbox group","multiline text area","date and time picker","image upload dropzone"]}],"connector":"teal dotted bracket-like guide visually linking the left feature list to the form builder panel"},"ui_details":{"badges_count":3,"badges":["必須","必須","必須"],"sample_values":{"name_placeholder":"例) 山田 花子","radio_options":["男性","女性","その他"],"checkbox_options":["カット","カラー","トリートメント","その他"],"textarea_placeholder":"ご自由にご記入ください","date_value":"2024/05/12","time_value":"14:00","upload_hint":"タップして画像を選択"},"window_controls":"minimal dots and drag handles, clean form rows with thin light gray borders"},"color_palette":{"primary":"violet to royal blue gradient","secondary":"teal","accent":"orange","surface":"white","text":"navy and gray"},"quality":"high-resolution polished startup marketing graphic, balanced spacing, elegant Japanese SaaS promotional banner for announcing customizable form input types"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"SaaS 功能更新横幅信息图","style":"简洁现代的日本科技营销视觉，柔和渐变抽象背景，高级 UI 展示，极简扁平插画，圆角卡片，微妙阴影，清晰排版","language":"中文","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"1:1","background":"白色底色搭配柔和紫色渐变波纹，淡雅点状半调装饰，角落带有轻盈的几何闪烁效果"},"headline":{"main":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"自由自定义\"}","sub":"{argument name=\"subheadline text\" default=\"6 种输入格式，灵活设计表单项\"}","main_style":"超大加粗日系无衬线字体，深蓝至紫罗兰渐变填充","sub_style":"中等加粗日系无衬线字体，青色与深海军蓝文字，两侧带有小型装饰性闪烁图标和细分割线"},"layout":{"composition":"双栏产品功能横幅","sections":[{"title":"输入类型列表","position":"left","count":6,"labels":["文本输入","单选按钮（单选）","复选框（多选）","段落文本","日期/时间","图片上传"],"container":"6 个圆角白色胶囊卡片垂直堆叠，带有柔和阴影","icon_style":"浅色圆形徽章内的大型简约彩色图标","colors":["purple","teal","teal","purple","teal","orange"]},{"title":"表单构建器 UI","position":"right","count":6,"labels":["姓名","性别","感兴趣的服务","需求/困扰","到店期望日期","参考图片（可选）"],"container":"大型圆角白色应用程序窗口，带有紫蓝色标题栏","header_text":"{argument name=\"panel title\" default=\"创建表单项\"}","field_types":["单行文本输入","单选按钮","复选框组","多行文本区域","日期和时间选择器","图片上传拖拽区"]}],"connector":"青色点状括号式引导线，视觉上连接左侧功能列表与右侧表单构建器面板"},"ui_details":{"badges_count":3,"badges":["必填","必填","必填"],"sample_values":{"name_placeholder":"例) 山田 花子","radio_options":["男","女","其他"],"checkbox_options":["剪发","染发","护理","其他"],"textarea_placeholder":"请自由填写","date_value":"2024/05/12","time_value":"14:00","upload_hint":"点击选择图片"},"window_controls":"极简圆点和拖拽手柄，带有细浅灰色边框的整洁表单行"},"color_palette":{"primary":"紫罗兰至宝蓝色渐变","secondary":"青色","accent":"橙色","surface":"白色","text":"海军蓝与灰色"},"quality":"高分辨率精致初创公司营销图，平衡的间距，优雅的 SaaS 推广横幅，用于宣布可自定义的表单输入类型"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 日文 SaaS 表单构建器横幅：一张精致的日文 SaaS 营销信息图横幅，展示了六种可自定义的表单输入类型，用于推广产品功能更新。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
